name: ucast-sql-null-equality-bug
description: @ucast/sql generates wrong SQL for null checks: { deletedAt: { $eq: null } } produces 'deletedAt = $1' with params [null], but SQL requires 'deletedAt IS NULL' for correct semantics.
relevantCode: // Workaround: Custom interpreter or post-processing for IS NULL
recommendation: Document limitation. Consider custom $isNull operator or post-process WHERE clause to fix = NULL patterns.
